'''Nason Laric''' was a male [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Niquon]], who trained him on [[Skalokor]]. Laric wielded a green [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Biography==
Niquon once sent Laric to take the remains of an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] discovered by [[Borta (Dolandu)|Borta]] to [[Lowghen Badra]] on [[Yabosta]]. An unknown [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yabosta Dark Jedi apprentice|apprentice]] of [[Von Totha]] waylaid Laric to get him out of her way so she or her allies would be free to assassinate Niquon, but Lowghen Badra helped Laric escape. He then rescued Niquon from a [[Drethi/Legends|Drethi]] sent to Skalokor by Totha's group.<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />
